description: 5 improvements: one-click Vercel publish, form builder with lead capture, image upload/crop, template library, SEO & analytics

userStories.title: Published pages database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a published_landing_pages table so that published page data is persisted and queryable
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates published_landing_pages table with: id (UUID PK), session_id (FK), org_id, user_id, slug (unique), title, html_content, meta_description, og_image_url, custom_domain, vercel_deployment_id, vercel_url, status (draft/published/unpublished), published_at, updated_at, created_at
RLS policies: users can CRUD own org's pages
Unique index on slug, index on org_id
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Publish service with Vercel deploy API
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a landingPublishService that deploys HTML to Vercel so pages go live with a URL
acceptanceCriteria: New service at src/lib/services/landingPublishService.ts
publish() method: generates final HTML with SEO tags, calls Vercel Deploy API, stores in published_landing_pages
unpublish() method: removes deployment, updates status
updateSlug() method: updates slug, triggers redeployment
Vercel API token from org settings (not VITE_ prefixed)
Returns live URL on success, toast on error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Image persistence on publish
userStories.description: As a user, I want AI-generated images permanently hosted so they don't break after publish
acceptanceCriteria: On publish, all base64/temporary image URLs uploaded to Supabase Storage landing-page-assets bucket
HTML updated with permanent public URLs before Vercel deploy
Storage bucket: public read, write for authenticated users
Handles both base64 data URLs and external URLs
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Publish modal UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a publish button and modal so I can set my page slug and publish with one click
acceptanceCriteria: Publish button in EditorToolbar (assembly mode), Lucide Globe icon
Modal with: slug input (auto-suggested), title, URL preview (pages.use60.com/{slug}), publish button
Slug validation: lowercase, alphanumeric + hyphens, 3-60 chars, unique check
Loading state during deployment, success state with copy URL + open link
Re-publish updates existing deployment
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Published pages list view
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my published pages so I can manage them
acceptanceCriteria: New route at /landing-pages with table of published pages
Columns: title, slug, status, published date, live URL (clickable)
Actions: copy URL, open page, unpublish, edit (opens builder)
Empty state when no pages
Filtered by active org
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Custom domain mapping via Vercel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to connect a custom domain to my published page
acceptanceCriteria: Custom domain input in publish modal (expandable section)
Instructions: Add CNAME record pointing to cname.vercel-dns.com
Calls Vercel Domains API to add domain
Stores in published_landing_pages.custom_domain
Shows verification status (pending/active)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Form submissions database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a landing_form_submissions table so form data from published pages is stored
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates landing_form_submissions with: id (UUID PK), page_id (FK), org_id, form_data (JSONB), source_url, ip_address, user_agent, submitted_at
RLS: org members can read their org's submissions
Index on page_id and org_id
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Form submission edge function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an edge function that receives form submissions from published pages
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function handle-landing-form-submission/index.ts
POST with { page_id, form_data, source_url }
Validates page_id exists and is published
Stores in landing_form_submissions
Rate limit: 10 per IP per minute per page
CORS via getCorsHeaders(req), verify_jwt = false (public)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: FormBlock shared component
userStories.description: As a user, I want CTA sections to have working email capture forms so pages collect leads
acceptanceCriteria: New component src/components/landing-builder/sections/shared/FormBlock.tsx
Configurable fields: name, email, phone, company, message
Client-side validation: email format, required fields
Submit button with loading + success/error states
POST to handle-landing-form-submission edge function
Styled with section brand config
Works in preview iframe and published HTML
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Form config in section data model + CTA integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want sections to support form configuration so the builder can add forms to CTAs
acceptanceCriteria: Extend LandingSection with optional form?: { fields: FormField[], submit_label, success_message, notification_email? }
FormField type: { name, type, label, required, placeholder? }
CTA components (CtaCentered, CtaSplitLeft, CtaGradient) render FormBlock when section.form defined
Default form config for CTAs: email (required) + name (optional)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Form editor in Properties Panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure form fields in the editor so I can customize what data I collect
acceptanceCriteria: Form tab in PropertiesPanel for CTA sections
Toggle to enable/disable form
Add/remove/reorder fields with drag handles
Per-field: label, placeholder, required toggle, type dropdown
Submit label + success message editors
Live preview updates
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Form submissions viewer
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view form submissions so I can follow up with leads
acceptanceCriteria: Submissions tab on /landing-pages list view
Click page to see submissions table
Columns: date, email, name, other fields
Export to CSV button
Submission count badge on page row
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Auto-create contacts from form submissions
userStories.description: As a user, I want submissions to auto-create contacts in 60's pipeline so leads flow into my CRM
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle in page settings: Auto-create contacts from submissions
Edge function creates contacts record with owner_id = page owner
Maps: email → contact email, name → name, company → company
Creates activities record: Lead captured from landing page
Deduplicates by email — existing contact gets activity only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Landing builder assets storage bucket
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Supabase Storage bucket for user-uploaded landing page assets
acceptanceCriteria: landing-builder-assets bucket created
Public read, authenticated write within org
Max file: 5MB, types: jpeg, png, webp, gif, svg+xml
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Image upload service
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a service that handles image upload and URL generation for the builder
acceptanceCriteria: New service src/lib/services/landingAssetService.ts
uploadImage(file, sessionId) → uploads to landing-builder-assets/{orgId}/{sessionId}/{filename}, returns public URL
deleteImage(url) → removes from storage
File validation: type, size, max 4096x4096
Unique filenames to prevent collisions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Image upload in Properties Panel + inline toolbar
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload my own image for a section so I'm not limited to AI generation
acceptanceCriteria: Upload Image button in PropertiesPanel Assets section
Upload button in InlineEditController floating toolbar (Lucide Upload icon)
File picker filtered to image types
Upload progress indicator
Updates section.image_url and sets image_status to complete
Thumbnail preview after upload
Paste URL input for external images
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Image crop modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want to crop images so they fit my section layout
acceptanceCriteria: After upload, optional crop modal with react-easy-crop
Aspect ratio presets: Free, 16:9, 4:3, 1:1
Apply saves cropped version to storage, updates URL
Skip uses original uncropped
Also accessible from Properties Panel Crop button
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Template data format and 6 starter templates
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a template format and starter templates so users can start from pre-built pages
acceptanceCriteria: New directory src/components/landing-builder/templates/
Template type with: id, name, description, category, thumbnail, sections[], brandConfig
6 templates: SaaS Hero, Agency, Product Launch, Event/Webinar, Waitlist, Minimal Portfolio
Each has 4-8 sections with placeholder copy and layout variants
Exported from templates/index.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Template gallery in builder empty state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to browse and pick a template so I can skip the strategy phase
acceptanceCriteria: Start from Template card in LandingBuilderEmpty
Opens gallery modal showing templates as cards
Cards: name, description, category badge, section count, thumbnail
Category filter tabs
Full-width preview with ReactSectionRenderer on click
Use this template button loads into assembly mode
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Template selection phase skip logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I want template selection to bypass Strategy + Copy so users go straight to editing
acceptanceCriteria: Template select: setAssemblySections(template.sections), setAssemblyBrandConfig(template.brandConfig)
Sets isAssemblyMode = true, currentPhase = 2
Workspace created with sections pre-populated, current_phase: 2
Asset queue NOT started (templates use placeholders, user regenerates or uploads)
Chat available for refinements
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SEO fields data model + auto-generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SEO metadata stored in workspace so pages have proper meta tags
acceptanceCriteria: Extend workspace type with seo?: { title, description, og_image_url?, keywords?, canonical_url?, gtm_id?, facebook_pixel_id? }
Auto-generate: title from hero headline, description from hero subhead (160 chars)
SEO fields saved to workspace and copied to published_landing_pages on publish
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SEO settings panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit SEO meta tags so my page appears correctly in search and social
acceptanceCriteria: Page Settings button in EditorToolbar (Lucide Settings icon)
Panel with SEO tab: title (60 char counter), description (160 char counter), keywords, OG image preview
Analytics tab: GTM ID input, Facebook Pixel ID, custom head script textarea
Auto-saves to workspace
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SEO tags + analytics scripts in HTML export
userStories.description: As a developer, I want HTML export to include all SEO meta and tracking scripts
acceptanceCriteria: wrapInHtml() includes: <title>, meta description, og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, twitter:card, canonical
GTM script in <head> + noscript in <body> if ID provided
Facebook Pixel script if ID provided
Custom head scripts injected
JSON-LD Organization schema from org profile
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: OG image auto-generation on publish
userStories.description: As a user, I want an OG image auto-generated so social shares look professional
acceptanceCriteria: On publish (if no custom OG image), generate 1200x630 image via Nano Banana
Prompt uses hero headline + brand colors
Upload to Supabase Storage, set as og_image_url
Fallback: use hero section image if generation fails
Typecheck passes
